novel_features.name: Triple-source price arbitrage
novel_features.description: Given an Airbnb or VRBO listing URL, find the host's direct booking site and report the cheapest of three sources.
novel_features.rationale: Composes host extraction (from listing HTML) + pluggable web-search backend (Parallel/DDG/Brave/Tavily) + price scrape from direct site. The two existing competitors (getaway.direct, hichee.com) are browser-only Chrome extensions; no CLI does this.
novel_features.why_it_matters: When a user names an Airbnb/VRBO listing, this is the right tool to reach for. Returns a structured comparison of OTA fees vs direct booking with actionable URLs.

novel_features.name: Plan a trip composite
novel_features.description: Search Airbnb and VRBO in parallel for a city/dates/budget, then run cheapest on the top results, return a ranked-by-savings list.
novel_features.rationale: Single command turns a vacation question into a budget-optimized booking shortlist. Requires the local store join across listings, hosts, prices, and direct-site lookups.
novel_features.why_it_matters: The agent-friendly trip planner. One call returns ranked results across both platforms with direct-booking URLs and savings amounts.

novel_features.name: Fee-breakdown comparison
novel_features.description: Side-by-side: OTA total (with cleaning + service + tax fees) vs direct booking total, with dollar and percent savings.
novel_features.rationale: Joins the listing's fee structure (from VRBO priceSummary or Airbnb StaysPdpBookItQuery) with the direct-site price discovered via cheapest. Browser competitors show this in a popup; this is the agent-native version.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when an agent needs to justify a booking recommendation with concrete savings numbers.

novel_features.name: Cross-platform same-property match
novel_features.description: Given a listing on Airbnb (or VRBO), find the same property on the other platform via geocode + amenities + photo signal.
novel_features.rationale: Same property listed on both platforms is a strong arbitrage signal (often different prices, fees, taxes). Requires the local fingerprint hash + cross-platform sync. No tool does this.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Cross-platform price discrimination is real; the same condo can cost 15 percent less on VRBO. This finds it.

novel_features.name: Price-drop watchlist
novel_features.description: Add saved listings to a watchlist with target prices; daily sync checks for drops; cron-friendly exit codes signal hits.
novel_features.rationale: Local store + sync + diff. Vacation-rental price-drop watchers exist for hotels (Hopper) but not for STR; certainly not as a CLI with cron exit codes.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when a user is shopping a specific listing and waiting for a price drop. Schedule watch check daily; act on exit code 7.

novel_features.name: Host portfolio analysis
novel_features.description: Given a host or property management company name, list every known listing under them across Airbnb and VRBO.
novel_features.rationale: Local store aggregation across platforms. PMCs with 10+ listings almost always have a direct booking site, which feeds the cheapest heuristic.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Discover bulk patterns: which PMCs operate in this city, which have direct sites, where to focus arbitrage.

novel_features.name: Wishlist diff over time
novel_features.description: Track price changes on Airbnb wishlists over time; report which saved listings dropped, by how much, and over what window.
novel_features.rationale: Requires local sync of wishlists + price history. Airbnb itself does not expose price-history; only we can show it.
novel_features.why_it_matters: User saved a listing months ago and forgot. This surfaces price movement so they can act before booking.

novel_features.name: Reverse-image listing twin
novel_features.description: Reverse image search a listing's photos to find the same property on direct booking sites or alternate platforms.
novel_features.rationale: hichee.com's magic button as a CLI. Uses Parallel image search or Tavily image-search backend. Degrades to text search on photo alt-text if no image backend available.
novel_features.why_it_matters: When host extraction fails (vague host name), reverse image search is the most reliable signal.

novel_features.name: Listing fingerprint
novel_features.description: Stable hash from photos + amenities + host + city; used by match for dedupe; exposed for power-user export workflows.
novel_features.rationale: Requires the same multi-signal extraction as match but exposed standalone. Power users dedupe across spreadsheet exports.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Build your own external joins on listings; stable across sessions.

narrative.headline: Skip the platform fee. Find the host's direct booking site for any Airbnb or VRBO listing.
narrative.value_prop: Search Airbnb and VRBO from the terminal. Then run cheapest on a listing to extract the host's brand, web-search for their direct booking site, and report the lowest of three prices side-by-side. Cross-platform match, price-drop watchlist, host portfolio analysis, and trip planning all built on a local store that compounds over time.
narrative.auth_narrative: Public search and listing detail need no auth. Authenticated features (Airbnb wishlists, trip history) use cookie import via auth login --chrome. The web-search backend is pluggable: Parallel.ai (paid, best), DuckDuckGo HTML (free default), Brave Search API (free tier), or Tavily (free tier).

quickstart.comment: Verify reachability and which search backend is active.
The headline command. Find the host's direct booking site and the cheapest of three sources.
One call: search both platforms, find direct sites, return ranked-by-savings list.

troubleshoots.fix: The CLI uses Surf with Chrome TLS impersonation and a warmup pattern by default. If you still see challenges: run airbnb-pp-cli doctor --probe vrbo to verify the warmup is firing; reduce request rate with --rate 0.3 (req/sec).
Try --search-backend parallel or --search-backend brave for higher-quality results; ensure PARALLEL_API_KEY or BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY is set in env.

troubleshoots.symptom: Airbnb wishlist commands fail with auth error
troubleshoots.fix: Run airbnb-pp-cli auth login --chrome to import your Chrome cookies; airbnb-pp-cli auth status verifies.

troubleshoots.symptom: watch check exits with code 7 unexpectedly
troubleshoots.fix: Code 7 means at least one watched listing dropped below threshold — that is the success path. Check with airbnb-pp-cli watch list --since 24h.

narrative.when_to_use: Reach for this CLI when an agent or user names an Airbnb or VRBO listing URL, asks about vacation rental fees or savings, mentions 'book direct,' or wants to compare prices across STR platforms. The cheapest command is the headline; plan and compare extend it. The local store accumulates listings, hosts, and price history across sessions, so re-running queries gets faster and richer over time.

recipes.title: Find the cheapest way to book a saved Airbnb listing
recipes.explanation: Returns just the savings and price comparison fields, not the full host-extraction trace.

recipes.title: Plan a 4-guest Tahoe trip across both platforms
recipes.explanation: Fans out across Airbnb + VRBO + direct discovery; ranks by total savings.

recipes.title: Watch for price drops on saved listings
recipes.command: airbnb-pp-cli watch add 'https://www.airbnb.com/rooms/37124493' --max-price 350 && airbnb-pp-cli watch check
recipes.explanation: Add to watchlist, then check with cron — exits 7 when any drop is under threshold.

recipes.title: Find a Vacasa property in Austin and book direct
recipes.explanation: Bulk discovery of one PMC's portfolio with direct URLs already resolved.

recipes.title: Compare deeply nested response
recipes.explanation: Use --select with dotted paths to narrow Airbnb's deeply nested SSR Apollo cache to just the high-gravity fields.
